input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: remove old single-crate src/, update README and CLAUDE.md for workspace

- Removed src/ and tests/ (replaced by colmena-core/, colmena-cli/, colmena-mcp/)
- README: updated architecture diagram, added MCP tools section, workspace structure
- CLAUDE.md: updated quick reference, conventions, MCP tools, workspace commands

Last direct commit to main. All future work uses feature/ branches + MR.

built with ❤️‍🔥 by AppSec

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push 2>&1
